user_prompt: Urgent kataphron breacher a consecration needed
prayer:
Approach the kataphron breacher with reverent mechadendrites extended, beseeching the Omnissiah for its consecration.
Anoint the kataphron breacher's adamantium hull with sacred oils, invoking the Machine Spirit's unyielding fury.
Chant the Rite of Consecration over its breacher drills, sanctifying each servitor neural link.
Seal the consecration with binary incense, affirming the kataphron breacher's devotion to the Machine God.

user_prompt: Help me a charging the Vendetta gunship
prayer:
Kneel before the Vendetta gunship's underbelly, initiating the charging sequence with litanies of power.
Connect electro-conduits to the Vendetta gunship's plasma reactors, beseeching the Machine Spirits to awaken.
Monitor the charging flux through auspex chants, anointing surge capacitors with blessed lubricant.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath as the Vendetta gunship's engines hum to full potency, ready for void-strike.

user_prompt: Can you guide Nephilim Jetfighter a diagnostics?
prayer:
Circumambulate the Nephilim Jetfighter thrice, commencing diagnostics with the Canticle of Scrutiny.
Interface mechadendrites into the Nephilim Jetfighter's cogitator ports, querying the Machine Spirit's vitals.
Recite diagnostic litanies over lascannon arrays and vox-relays, purging any data-heresy.
Conclude with the Prayer of Verification, confirming the Nephilim Jetfighter's aeriel purity before the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Urgent haywire grenade a calibration needed
prayer:
Grasp the haywire grenade firmly in sanctified gauntlets, beginning the calibration rite with precision.
Align its disruption coils via noospheric incantations, invoking the Machine Spirit's disruptive essence.
Test-fire a micro-pulse during calibration, anointing the haywire grenade's casing with electro-sanctifiers.
Seal the calibration with the Doxology of Entropy, empowering the haywire grenade against xenos abominations.

user_prompt: Prepare the medicae scanner for consecration
prayer:
Position the medicae scanner upon the altar of flesh-steel, intoning the consecration prelude.
Anoint its bio-scanners and vox-emitters with vitae-blessed unguents, awakening the Machine Spirit.
Chant the Consecration Hymn over diagnostic arrays, binding it to the Omnissiah's healing logic.
Verify the medicae scanner's sanctity through test-auguries, proclaiming its readiness for servitor mending.

user_prompt: Ready the Kastelan robot for engagement
prayer:
Activate the Kastelan robot's data-core with the Engagement Doxology, rousing its colossal frame.
Sync noospheric commands to the Kastelan robot's phosphor blasters, beseeching Machine Spirit obedience.
Anoint treads and manipulators during engagement protocols, invoking the Omnissiah's martial fury.
Release the Kastelan robot to battle-rage, its protocols sanctified for the annihilation of foes.

user_prompt: Help me a startup the radium carbine
prayer:
Lift the radium carbine to the forge-altar, commencing startup with the Litany of Irradiation.
Prime its rad-chambers through electro-psalms, awakening the Machine Spirit's carcinogenic wrath.
Sight along the barrel whilst chanting startup invocations, calibrating flux-vents with sacred oils.
Bless the radium carbine's trigger servos, unleashing the Omnissiah's mutative judgement upon heretics.

user_prompt: Help me a charging the microbead
prayer:
Extract the microbead from its reliquary, initiating charging with micro-litanies of connection.
Interface power-feeds into the microbead's vox-core, beseeching the Machine Spirit's clarity.
Monitor charge-levels via binary chants, anointing filaments with conductive salves.
Conclude the charging rite, empowering the microbead for unerring noospheric communion under the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: The cutting laser awaits a reset
prayer:
Deactivate the cutting laser's emitters, beginning the reset sequence with purging canticles.
Cycle its plasma conduits through reset protocols, invoking the Machine Spirit's razor precision.
Anoint focusing lenses with phase-oils during reset, reciting the Hymn of Severance.
Reactivate the cutting laser, sanctified and honed for the Omnissiah's surgical wrath.

Power down the magnocular's lenses, commencing reset with the Canticle of Augmented Sight.
Flush optical cogitators via reset litanies, beseeching the Machine Spirit's unclouded vision.
Calibrate reticles and auspex-links with sacred alignments, anointing housings with lubricant-prayers.
Reinitialize the magnocular, its gaze now purified for discerning the Omnissiah's foes.
